overall.description: Gameplay footage from a truck driving simulator (GTA V) showing a first-person perspective from inside a semi-truck cabin. The truck travels along a multi-lane highway, passes through a tunnel, and continues through coastal and urban environments with moderate traffic and warm afternoon lighting.

events.description: driver looks left to check side mirror and view adjacent semi-truck

agents.ego_description: driving on highway, checking left mirror, approaching tunnel entrance

notable_agents.action: semi-truck with red and yellow trailer driving parallel in left lane
blue truck ahead in same lane maintaining distance

entered.detail: concrete highway overpass spanning the road ahead with green signage
tall concrete sound barrier wall running along right side of highway
dark tunnel entrance approaching at end of highway segment
overhead green highway direction signs mounted on metal framework

segments.scene_description: The truck drives along a sunlit multi-lane highway with concrete barriers on the right. The driver glances left at a passing semi-truck before focusing on the tunnel entrance ahead. Overhead signs and an overpass structure are visible as the vehicle approaches the dark tunnel opening.

events.description: entering tunnel, bright natural light fades to dim artificial lighting
approaching tunnel exit, daylight visible as bright spot ahead

agents.ego_description: maintaining steady speed through tunnel, following vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: car ahead with red tail lights visible in the tunnel distance

entered.detail: overhead fluorescent lights lining the curved tunnel ceiling
concrete tunnel wall with emergency exit markers and lighting fixtures
concrete tunnel wall with reflective safety strips

segments.scene_description: The truck enters the tunnel where natural light gives way to artificial ceiling lights. The enclosed concrete space has vehicles spaced far apart. The driver maintains a steady course following the tail lights of a car ahead as the tunnel exit light grows visible in the distance.

events.description: exiting tunnel into bright daylight revealing coastal landscape with ocean
driver glances left toward side mirror and ocean view

agents.ego_description: driving along coastal highway, checking mirrors, maintaining moderate speed

notable_agents.action: blue truck ahead maintaining consistent distance
white car passing in left lane

entered.detail: blue ocean visible beyond the highway guardrail on left side
residential buildings and houses along the distant coastline
highway divider wall separating lanes on the right side
palm trees lining the coastal road against the sky

segments.scene_description: Exiting the tunnel reveals a bright coastal highway with the ocean visible on the left beyond palm trees. The truck passes residential buildings along the shore while maintaining speed. The driver briefly checks the left mirror, showing the side view of the coastal landscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban multi-lane highway with commercial buildings

events.description: entering denser urban area with multi-story buildings closer to highway
approaching highway interchange with merging traffic from right ramp

agents.ego_description: navigating through urban highway traffic, maintaining lane position among multiple vehicles

notable_agents.action: black car merging onto highway from right side ramp
traffic ahead slowing down approaching interchange

entered.detail: multi-story residential and commercial buildings close to highway
concrete overpass structure carrying cross traffic ahead
green directional highway signs indicating exits and routes

segments.scene_description: The highway transitions to an urban environment with apartment buildings lining the left side. The truck navigates moderate traffic while approaching an interchange with overhead signs. Palm trees continue along the route as vehicles merge from the right ramp and the concrete barrier passes closer to the vehicle.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective from a truck cabin as it transitions from a bright open highway through a dark tunnel and out onto a sunlit coastal road. It begins on a multi-lane highway under a clear sky, passing concrete barriers and overhead signs as the vehicle approaches a dark tunnel entrance. As the truck enters the tunnel, the natural daylight is replaced by artificial ceiling lights reflecting off the enclosed concrete walls while following the distant tail lights of another car. The scene then opens up as the truck emerges from the tunnel, where the lighting shifts back to a bright afternoon glow and the landscape expands to reveal the ocean and palm trees on the left. Finally, the camera captures a brief glimpse of the shoreline in the side mirror as the truck passes residential buildings along the coast.

The shot follows a continuous first-person perspective as a highway journey transitions into a dense urban environment. It begins with the open road shifting toward a city landscape, where apartment buildings start to line the left side of the route. As the truck navigates through moderate traffic, the scene opens up toward a highway interchange marked by overhead signs and passing palm trees. The camera then tracks the vehicle as it moves closer to a concrete barrier while other cars merge from a right-hand ramp, finally settling into the steady flow of the city's arterial traffic.
